meaning: vt.使更新,使恢复,重申,补充,续借,复兴vi.更新,重新开始
examples: We have to renew our efforts to attract young players.
We went to renew our monthly season ticket.
Larry's landlord threatened not to renew his lease.
They agreed to hold another meeting "at the highest level" to renew their mediation efforts.
On December 13, the Senate declined to act on a bill to renew the TAG accounts.
